name: open-risk-register
description: Free NIS2 risk assessment tool based on NIST SP 800-30 R1

scripts.build: esbuild src/js/app.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/bundle.js && esbuild src/js/site.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/site.js && esbuild src/js/pdf.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/pdf-bundle.js && esbuild src/css/main.css --bundle --minify --loader:.woff2=file --outfile=dist/style.css && esbuild src/css/site.css --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/site.css && node -e "const fs=require('fs');let h=fs.readFileSync('app/index.html','utf8');const v=Date.now();h=h.replace(/bundle\.js\?v=\d+/g,'bundle.js?v='+v).replace(/pdf-bundle\.js\?v=\d+/g,'pdf-bundle.js?v='+v).replace(/style\.css\?v=\d+/g,'style.css?v='+v);fs.writeFileSync('app/index.html',h);"
scripts.dev: esbuild src/js/app.js --bundle --sourcemap --outfile=dist/bundle.js & esbuild src/js/site.js --bundle --sourcemap --outfile=dist/site.js & esbuild src/css/main.css --bundle --loader:.woff2=file --outfile=dist/style.css & esbuild src/css/site.css --bundle --outfile=dist/site.css
